title: upgraded Glassbox optimization
summary:
I updated the optimization part of Glassbox today. Switched from Adam to Levenberg-Marquardt using Eigen. It is much faster now. It takes 5-15 iterations instead of 200. The old way had too much overhead with finite differences.

Also fixed a ranking issue. Sometimes the C++ engine scores did not match the actual formula output because of soft operators. Now I added a display_mse step to check the real string output. Added a drift_penalty too, so it ignores formulas that look good in the engine but perform bad in reality.
commitMessages: feat(evolution): implement Levenberg-Marquardt optimization and honest MSE ranking
